title: Isolation Room Capacity Unavailable Before Execution
scenario: A clinical transfer requires isolation capacity, but no isolation room is available at execution time.
initial_state: The transfer was authorized assuming isolation capacity existed.
state_transition: Isolation capacity becomes unavailable before execution.
execution_boundary: The transfer is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires reconstruction of required care-setting resources.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because required isolation capacity is unavailable.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when required isolation resources are unavailable.
